arts.ttl: What Patrick Dorgu said to referee after controversial Man United penalty in Real Sociedad win
arts.sum: Manchester United cruised into the next round of the Europa League after their win over Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 4-1 Real Sociedad (5-2 agg): Match report & 4 talking points as Amorim's team give statement performance
arts.sum: Analysing the key talking points from Manchester United's Europa League last 16 second leg clash with Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel makes Arsenal and Man Utd calls as England boss springs squad surprises
arts.sum: New England boss Thomas Tuchel is set to name his first Three Lions squad ahead of games with Latvia and Albania later this month and a few shocks could be in store

arts.ttl: Man Utd in Heaven! Young stars PROVE Amorim should be trusted with future
arts.sum: With United desperate to find hope for the future, the performances of their young stars will offer optimism that Amorim’s side are moving in the right direction with a platform to work from going into the summer transfer window. While Fernandes will deservedly grab the headlines, two of United’s best performers across the 90 minutes were January signings Ayden Heaven and Patrick Dorgu, with the young duo silencing the creative Takefusa Kubo on Sociedad’s right flank.

arts.ttl: Patrick Dorgu tells referee he was WRONG to award him a penalty against Real Sociedad - before decision is overturned
arts.sum: Patrick Dorgu bizarrely told the referee not to give Manchester United a penalty during the Red Devils' win over Real Sociedad. Video replays then showed Dorgu saying he had not been foule.

arts.ttl: Fernandes hat-trick powers electric Manchester United past Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Manchester United’s trophy hopes live to fight on against Lyon in the Europa League quarter-final after a swaggering display that battered Real Sociedad and must be the Ruben Amorim blueprint. From the moment they fell behind early on, his side was electrified, as if finally locating the high-voltage socket under Amorim and gleefully plugging themselves in. United came at Sociedad relentlessly, a whir of energy and creativity that is the best advertisement yet for where their head coach might take them. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man United's next five fixtures compared after Europa League penalty drama
arts.sum: Manchester United are through to the quarter-finals of the Europa League where they will face Lyon over two legs

arts.ttl: Man Utd's irreplaceable star sends message to Sir Jim Ratcliffe after overpaid blast
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes, as he has done on so many occasions this season, came to his side's rescue on Thursday night to haul them into the Europa League quarter-finals and keep their campaign alive

arts.ttl: Man United 4-1 Real Sociedad (5-2 agg.): Bruno Fernandes hits hat-trick as Red Devils reach Europa League last eight
arts.sum: Red Devils played excellently and scored four times on the night to oust Sociedad

arts.ttl: Man United 4-1 Real Sociedad (5-2 on agg) - PLAYER RATINGS: Who rolled back the years at Old Trafford? Which star delivered a performance full of excitement? And who must do better?
arts.sum: AADAM PATEL AT OLD TRAFFORD: Bruno Fernandes scored a hat-trick to lead Manchester United into the Europa League quarter-finals after a 5-2 aggregate win over Real Sociedad.
